title: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Stock Investors Activity & Sentiment - TipRanks
text: SolarEdge Technologies Retail Investor Sentiment. Current Retail Investor Sentiment: SEDG's Investor Sentiment is Very Negative. According to recent data, 1.5% of TipRanks' retail investors changed their holding of SEDG in the last 7 days, and 3.3% of TipRanks' retail investors changed their holding of SEDG in the last 30 days. Sentiment Disconnection: Interestingly, despite multiple price target raises from various analysts, SEDG saw a bearish market movement, indicating that the positive sentiment from analysts did not translate into investor confidence. Additionally, the company's weak financial performance, including negative net margins and EPS, likely contributed to the bearish trend as investors remain cautious about its profitability. Recent Developments: On April 15, 2026, Goldman Sachs downgraded their outlook for SolarEdge Technologies (NasdaqGS:SEDG) from Neutral to Sell. The stock has experienced mixed performance, with recent analyst activity and mixed opinions continuing to influence retail investor sentiment toward the company.
